allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path ''machine'',''filament'',''process'' -DestinationPath ''SV05 Sprite Pro Bundle.zip'' -Force; Rename-Item ''SV05 Sprite Pro Bundle.zip'' ''SV05 Sprite Pro Bundle.orca_printer''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Add-Type -Assembly System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(''SV05 Sprite Pro Bundle.orca_printer''\).Entries | Select-Object FullName")
